channel.title: Mstsc on Margrop Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Mstsc on Margrop Blog

item.title: Install Frp client on Windows and use remote desktop
item.description: As the usage restrictions of TeamViewer become more and more strict, it will be regarded as an enterprise user from time to time. After all, there is no free lunch in the world. The following is a method to use the Frp client for intranet penetration and remote control. Please prepare your own Frp server and consider the security risks of exposing port 3389 to the public network. Download Frp client #Configure Frp client
